title: Neon Semester Avemarian
wikitext:
[]: Neon Semester Avemarian             Quote Post by darth_mark » Tue Jan 10, 2006 12:02 pm this looks interesting: [URL=http://m3animationbox.sakura.ne.jp/avemarian.html]http://m3animationbox.sakura.ne.jp/avemarian.html[/URL] A Japanese fan animation circle, M3 Animation Group, is putting together a doujin Evangelion / Maria-sama ga Miteru crossover called "Shin Gakki Avemarian" / "Neon Semester Avemarian". Incredibly, they've actually animated an opening..

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 10, 2006 1:05 pm While the animation is not news http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1055 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=115&start=30 that there is more to it than just a spoof of the opening is. Marimite is not the first of choices I would have made to cross-over, dealing as it does with slice-of-life girls-school stories, in a system with a formalization of "crushes" (which makes it a favourite in the shoujo-ai crowd). I am in the middle of watching d/l'd fansubs, and it is a pleasant enough title to watch.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Jan 10, 2006 1:25 pm This is one type of interseting.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Jan 10, 2006 1:45 pm Hmmm... Kawaii Japanese writing... I wish I could understand them... :? 8)

[]:             Quote Post by 2Shea » Wed Jan 11, 2006 1:00 am I'd like to see this, though nowhere I visit to get my anime seems to have it.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 11, 2006 3:47 am 2Shea wrote: I'd like to see this, though nowhere I visit to get my anime seems to have it.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Wed Jan 11, 2006 4:17 am Marimite is not the first of choices I would have made to cross-over

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Jan 11, 2006 4:28 pm No cross-overs ever work because by nature all cross-overs suck. I rate them barely above Self-Inserts.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 11, 2006 4:39 pm Hmm... I think we are rapidly heading in the direction of the Fandom/Crossover thread here; a thread where things like this do dwell.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Jan 11, 2006 10:35 pm All I can say about that picture is. Ick!

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Jan 12, 2006 9:26 am Hmmm... Just where did I left my burf bag? Ah, never mind... the closet will be fine... Well there must be good crossovers, although I've never seen one, I guess. At least they make us laugh... or cry... or both... I really dunno. Are there good crossovers? Anybody? Please, tell me one!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 12, 2006 1:34 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: Are there good crossovers? Anybody? Please, tell me one!

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Jan 13, 2006 3:25 am Never heard of it. 'cuz I can't get too much anime. There are a couple of... ehemm... problems with getting them. But if you say so, I'll agree and sleep without nightmares of NGE-Dragon Ball/Sailor Moon crossovers... Really, thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jan 13, 2006 1:39 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: Never heard of it. 'cuz I can't get too much anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Fri Jan 13, 2006 5:24 pm I like it, that is a hawt pic, common!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jan 13, 2006 5:46 pm Just a 'shop (head transplant) of the well known Rei and Asuka picture. But Juri is hawt - and would be more appropriately teamed up with Maya :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Fri Jan 13, 2006 9:42 pm Gotta love that Maya. 8)

[]: Re: Neon Semester Avemarian             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 29, 2006 3:53 pm darth_mark wrote: this looks interesting: [URL=http://m3animationbox.sakura.ne.jp/avemarian.html]http://m3animationbox.sakura.ne.jp/avemarian.html[/URL]
